name: Temporal Context
description: Injects current local date/time and elapsed-time grounding into agent turns.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone used for local date/time formatting, e.g. America/Toronto.

locale.description: Intl locale used for human-readable date/time formatting.

statePath.description: Optional path for per-session temporal state. Supports ~ and $OPENCLAW_HOME.

maxStateEntries.description: Maximum number of recent sessions to retain in the state file.
